name: UploadCheck Production Pipeline Handoff
description: Callable runbook for NTO, NPO, and creator production pipelines that need UploadCheck before upload.

call_sequence.name: Check launch state
call_sequence.rule: For launch-sensitive workflows, continue only when product_hunt_ready=true and remaining_blockers is empty.

call_sequence.name: Fetch blocker handoff when blocked
call_sequence.rule: If blockers remain, report required actions and proof commands, then stop before Product Hunt or publish-sensitive steps.

call_sequence.name: Load pipeline recipe
call_sequence.rule: Select the closest profile and pass its sidecar-aware arguments into qc_run_local_file or the CLI.

call_sequence.name: Load cost basis
call_sequence.rule: Use this before pricing, plan, or model-backed review decisions.

call_sequence.name: Preflight estimated cost
call_sequence.rule: Keep cost_guardrail=downgrade by default so margin-breaking model-backed checks are removed before hosted execution.

call_sequence.name: Send media
call_sequence.rule: Reachable local files run through Render inline when small enough; large files use signed upload.

call_sequence.name: Poll job completion
call_sequence.rule: Poll until completed, failed, or blocked by usage/abuse limits.

call_sequence.name: Fetch report
call_sequence.rule: Use the report as the source of truth for verdict, flags, mediaIngress, observed provider usage, and cost telemetry.

call_sequence.name: Fetch marker CSV
call_sequence.rule: Use marker CSV for editor handoff whenever timestamped media repairs are useful.

call_sequence.name: Run repair loop
call_sequence.user_prompt: Show all QC flags and ask: Fix now?
call_sequence.rule: Group flags by BLOCK, WATCH, and PASS; apply only reachable fixes; return timestamped source/render instructions for unreachable media defects.

call_sequence.name: Rerun before upload-ready
call_sequence.rule: Do not call the asset upload-ready until UploadCheck has been rerun after edits and no BLOCK flags remain.

inline_ephemeral.recommended_for: small or medium local video, audio, image, transcript, manifest, watchlist, and sidecar payloads
inline_ephemeral.rule: Inline media runs through Render temp storage and must not expose server temp paths.

signed_upload.rule: Use Render temp storage by default or durable/object storage when configured.

margin_rules.stress_99_5000_verdict: $99 for 5,000 checked minutes is too generous for unlimited full-video AI review. It is only margin-safe as deterministic scan minutes with model-backed review capped, sampled, downgraded, or sold separately.

repair_loop_contract.user_prompt: Show all QC flags and ask: Fix now?
repair_loop_contract.source_or_render_instruction: Return timestamped source/render patch instructions instead of pretending the agent can edit unreachable media.
repair_loop_contract.completion_rule: Do not call the asset upload-ready until UploadCheck is rerun after edits and no BLOCK flags remain.

private_moat_rule: Public artifacts expose callable categories and repair behavior; exact thresholds, prompts, fixtures, and validator internals stay private.
